title: thelypteris nemoralis
intro: Thelypteris nemoralis, also known as the Wood Fern or Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris nemoralis include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Thelypteris nemoralis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in ointments and salves to treat skin irritations and wounds.
